title: The Promise to Grow Stronger
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Sanji, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Whitebeard, Sanji, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grand Line: Near the Shabondy archipelago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NEW WORLD: A certain winter island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This island is a particular favourite...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: What are you asking me to do...?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: That makes things nice and simple.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're coming up to a cliff !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Captain Apoo... both us and the boars...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...seem to be running on thin air!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: New World: A certain burning island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My legs are at DERE limit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OW... A fish just bit me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You get attached to these things, y'know?!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Whitebeard, Sanji, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.
